title: CTET Upper Primary Science: Last 5 Years PYQs
author: Compiled from official CBSE CTET papers
description: Every Paper II (Upper Primary, Science/Maths stream) question from the last 5 CTET sessions — Feb 2026, Dec 2024, July 2024, Jan 2024, and Aug 2023 — sourced from the official CBSE question papers and final answer keys on ctet.nic.in. Each session gives you the full paper (Child Development & Pedagogy, Language I, Language II, Mathematics & Science) to attempt cold, followed by a separate answers-and-explanations chapter so you're not tempted to peek.
